title: Streamer University 2026 ending date explained as Kai Cenat reveals what happens before July 20
summary_full: The grand finale of Streamer University 2026, hosted by Kai Cenat, is set for July 20th morning. Alumni have begun to flock to campus to engage with students in these last days of festivities. Kai has made it clear that any rule infractions could lead to expulsion from campus. This year's event boasts a longer duration than its predecessor, designed to maximize creative collaboration and ensure a vibrant atmosphere.
